    # Use XLOOKUP to find the value

# Calculate statistics

max_value = max(net_exports)

percentile_75 = sorted(net_exports)[len(net_exports)*3//4]

ws_task.cell(row=44, column=6).value = percentile_75

weighted_mean = sum(ws_task.cell(row=row, column=8).value * weight for row, weight in zip(range(35, 41), weights))
ws_task.cell(row=46, column=5).value = weighted_mean
